summary: E-commerce homepage with product search, category pages, and product details modal. Spanish interface. Features scroll restoration on navigation.
architectural_notes: searchHomepageProducts backend function must include description field in returned product data
Do not modify :root CSS custom properties block in index.css (theme color variables)
known_issues: searchHomepageProducts does not return description field, causing empty description in product details modal when opened from search results

new_feature_requests.summary: Modify the `searchHomepageProducts` function in `backend/main.mo` to include the `description` field in each returned product record. All existing functionality must be preserved: maximum 10 results limit, numeric-only barcode search logic, mixed-input name/description search logic, case-insensitive matching, partial substring matching, and all other currently returned product fields. The function signature and overall response structure must remain unchanged.

projectName: Add description field to searchHomepageProducts backend response
